description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a low-cut profile and a visually striking design. The upper is primarily composed of a patterned textile in shades of brown and white, with abstract linear graphics creating a dynamic look. The shoe has a white midsole with a visible air unit in the heel, characteristic of Nike's Air Max line, and a brown rubber outsole for traction. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with brown laces, and the heel area displays a prominent 'NIKE' logo in white against a dark background. The overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic materials, mesh, and rubber, providing both comfort and durability for urban environments. The shoe appears clean and structurally intact, indicating it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A stylish, patterned Nike athletic sneaker with a white midsole, brown and white textile upper, and visible branding. The shoe features a standard lace-up design and appears to be in excellent condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the patterned upper, white midsole with air unit, and brown outsole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and the abstract pattern on the upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the Nike swoosh, air unit, and the continuation of the graphic pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the 'NIKE' logo in white on the heel tab and the dark heel counter.
attribute_logo: White 'NIKE' text logo on the heel tab, white Nike swoosh on the side panels
